raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I called the " XXXX XXXX '' at the toll free number indicated on the brochure mailed to me. A Customer # was beside our address, although we had never been on a cruise before and were not " customers ''. I provided my husband 's Citi credit card number to hold plane reservations for the XXXX XXXX cruise but the credit card was immediately processed for the entire trip amount of {$7100.00} before we signed or even saw a contract and other booking forms that required passport numbers. I told the XXXX  agent that our passports had expired. Once we read the many contract documents, we refused to sign. We protested the charge to the Citi Card, but the Citi dispute resolution employee did not understand how contracts work, or perhaps didn't understand English, and without proof of a signed contract, determined that we were bound by the terms of XXXX XXXX written contract! XXXX committed fraud and Citi let them get away with it, despite our evidence supporting our claim for a refund.
